name: Limonade
description: A simple highball cocktail of BACARDÍ Limón flavoured rum and lemonade, stirred over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Fresh and tart, lemonade combines with BACARDÍ Limón rum for a truly invigorating drink, a worthy companion for those long hot summer afternoons.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in BACARDÍ Limón rum, followed by lemonade.
searchable_text: Limonade main rum BACARDÍ Limón Flavoured rum A simple highball cocktail of BACARDÍ Limón flavoured rum and lemonade, stirred over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Fresh and tart, lemonade combines with BACARDÍ Limón rum for a truly invigorating drink, a worthy companion for those long hot summer afternoons. ingredients 44 ml BACARDÍ Limón Flavoured rum, 89 ml Lemonade recipe steps Fill a highball glass with ice. Pour in BACARDÍ Limón rum, followed by lemonade. Stir gently. Garnish with a lemon wedge.
